title: inaccurate combination if signedness of non-ANSI style port declarations

features.name: non-ANSI port signed with implicit data signedness
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI style output port declaration where the port is declared signed but the corresponding wire declaration has no signedness keyword, which should combine to signed per IEEE 1800-2017 23.2.2.1

features.name: non-ANSI port implicit with data declared signed
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI style output port declaration where the port has no signedness keyword but the corresponding wire is declared signed, which should combine to signed per IEEE 1800-2017 23.2.2.1

features.name: non-ANSI port declared unsigned with implicit data
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI style output port declaration where the port is declared unsigned but the corresponding wire declaration has no signedness keyword

features.name: non-ANSI port implicit with data declared unsigned
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI style output port declaration where the port has no signedness keyword but the corresponding wire is declared unsigned

features.name: non-ANSI port signed with vector and implicit data signedness
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI style output port declaration with vector range where the port is declared signed but the corresponding wire declaration has no signedness keyword, which should combine to signed per IEEE 1800-2017 23.2.2.1

features.name: non-ANSI port with mismatched signedness between port and wire
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI style output port declaration where the port is declared signed but the wire is declared unsigned, testing that IEEE 1800-2017 23.2.2.1 requires signedness from either declaration to propagate
